description_long: This is a small, rectangular brick house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark, shingle-like tiles. The exterior walls are constructed from brownish bricks, giving the structure a sturdy and traditional appearance. A prominent brick chimney rises along one side of the house, extending above the roofline. The front facade features a simple wooden door and a single rectangular window, both set into the brickwork. The roof overhangs slightly on all sides, providing some shelter to the walls below. The overall design is modest and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A compact brick house with a steep gable roof, a chimney, a wooden door, and a single window on the front facade.
description_view_0: The gable end of the house is visible, showing the brick wall and the full height of the chimney on the left side.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the house, featuring a wooden door and a single window set in the brick wall beneath the shingled roof.
description_view_2: The opposite gable end is shown, mirroring the first view but without the chimney.
description_view_3: The rear side of the house is visible, dominated by the roof and the chimney extending upward along the wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements
